page_header.label: PAYMENT WIDGET
page_header.title: Embed Confidential Payments Anywhere
page_header.description: Add private payments to any website with React components, iframe integration, or vanilla JavaScript. Complete customization with your branding.

items.title: React Component
items.description: Native React component with TypeScript support, hooks integration, and full customization. Perfect for modern web applications.

items.title: Iframe Bridge
items.description: Framework-agnostic iframe integration with JavaScript bridge for communication. Works with any frontend technology.

items.title: Vanilla JS Script
items.description: Drop-in script tag integration. No build process or framework required. Perfect for static sites and simple integrations.

sections.title: REACT / TYPESCRIPT
JAVASCRIPT
HTML / JAVASCRIPT

paragraphs: The payment widget supports extensive customization options to match your brand and requirements. All configuration options are available across React, iframe, and vanilla JavaScript implementations.
The widget adapts to both light and dark themes, maintaining a clean, professional appearance that integrates seamlessly with your existing design.

sections.title: Start Integrating Today
sections.description: Add confidential payments to your website in minutes. Complete documentation and examples available in our developer portal.
